allow: Bash(cmd //c "docker exec sap-app php artisan key:generate")

Bash(cmd //c "docker exec sap-db mariadb -uroot -proot -e \\"CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS sap; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON sap.* TO 'admin'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;\\"")
Bash(cmd //c "docker cp c:\\Users\\teguh\\sap\\init.sql sap-db:/tmp/init.sql && docker exec sap-db mariadb -uroot -proot -e "source /tmp/init.sql"")
